title: Rich Argentinian Beef Stir-fry
description: A rich and tender post-workout dish featuring allspice for added flavor and protein-friendly with a high-protein content.

ingredients.name: beef sirloin
ingredients.notes: ensure it's lean meat to avoid high fat content

ingredients.name: allspice
ingredients.notes: for added flavor and protein quality assurance

instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Season the beef with allspice.
Sauté onions, garlic, and bell peppers in olive oil until softened.
Add beef to the pan, sear for about 2-3 minutes on each side or until browned.
Pour tomato paste over meat to create a thick sauce. Mix soy sauce evenly into the mixture.
Transfer the stir-fry to an oven-proof dish and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes.
Serve hot with steamed vegetables or rice.
